add_items_modal.title: Add Items to Order
add_items_modal.description: Select items to add to order

order_details_modal.no_items_found: No items found for this order.
order_details_modal.payments_will_appear: Payments made for this order will appear here.
order_details_modal.void_item_description: The item will be removed from the bill. Inventory will be restored automatically.

payment_modal.title: Add Payment - Order #{{id}}
payment_modal.description: Record a payment for this order. It currently has a remaining balance of {{amount}}.

cancel_order_modal.title: Cancel Order
cancel_order_modal.description: Are you sure you want to cancel this order? This will automatically restore inventory for items already sent to the kitchen.
cancel_order_modal.reason_placeholder: Why is this order being cancelled?
cancel_order_modal.reason_required_hint: Since payments have been recorded, a reason is required.

force_close_modal.title: Force Complete Order
force_close_modal.description: This order is not fully paid. Force-completing it will mark it as completed, but a reason is required.
force_close_modal.notes_placeholder: Explain why this underpaid order is being completed...

transfer_table_modal.title: Transfer Table
transfer_table_modal.description: Select an available table to transfer this order to. This will free up the current table ({{table}}) and immediately occupy the newly selected table.

refund_payment_modal.title: Refund Payment
refund_payment_modal.description: Are you sure you want to refund this {{method}} payment? This action will deduct {{amount}} from the order's total paid amount and recalculate its status.
refund_payment_modal.reason_placeholder: Why is this payment being refunded?

item_config_modal.modifiers_quantity_warning: Modifiers will apply to all {{count}} items. You can add items separately if you need different variations.

add_order_drawer.missing_items_toast: Please add at least one item to the order
add_order_drawer.missing_table_toast: Please select a table for Dine-in orders
add_order_drawer.create_description: Browse the menu and select items for this order.
add_order_drawer.kitchen_note_placeholder: e.g. Severe nut allergy at table

receipt.thank_you: Thank you for dining with us!

staff_tasks.update_status_dialog_description: Change the task status and optionally add a comment.

attendance_dashboard.fix_times_description: Contact your supervisor or an administrator to correct this record.
attendance_dashboard.no_shifts_today: No shifts scheduled for today. You don't need to clock in.

attendance_table.no_records: No attendance records found for the selected filters.
attendance_table.aria_long_paid_break: Unusually long paid break — review breaks

staff_layout.access_denied_message: You don't have permission to access this area. Please contact your manager or visit your professional profile.

MENU.label: Menu management
MENU.description: Create, update, and manage menu items, categories, and pricing.

RESERVATIONS.label: Reservation management
RESERVATIONS.description: View, create, update, and manage customer reservations and bookings.

STAFF.label: Staff management
STAFF.description: Manage staff members, roles, permissions, and work assignments.

OPENING_HOURS.label: Opening hours management
OPENING_HOURS.description: Configure business opening hours, special schedules, and closures.

BUSINESS_SETTINGS.label: Business settings
BUSINESS_SETTINGS.description: Manage business information, preferences, and operational settings.

ORDERS.label: Orders management
ORDERS.description: View, create, and manage customer orders for dine-in, takeaway, and delivery.

INVENTORY.label: Inventory management
INVENTORY.description: Track ingredients and stock levels, manage inventory items and units.

REVIEWS.label: Review management
REVIEWS.description: View and respond to reviews left by customers.

JOBS.label: Jobs management
JOBS.description: Create and manage job postings and applications.

TASKS.label: Tasks management
TASKS.description: Create, assign, and track staff tasks.

COMMUNICATIONS.label: Announcements & messages
COMMUNICATIONS.description: Send announcements and messages to staff.

WEBSITE.label: Website builder
WEBSITE.description: Create, edit, and publish the business's public website pages.

labels.no_items: No items yet. Click "Add Item" to start.
labels.no_items_category: No items in this category yet.

messages.delete_category_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category? This action cannot be undone and will remove all items within it.

tooltips.icon: Pick an icon to represent this menu in the UI.
tooltips.date_empty: Leave empty for a menu that is always active.
tooltips.time_empty: Leave empty for this menu to be active all day.

tracking.label: Tracking

tracking.none_desc: No inventory tracking for this item.

tracking.quantity_per_sale: How much is consumed per sale?
tracking.quantity_hint: If sold in liters and this item uses 0.5L, enter 0.5

messages.delete_item_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This will also remove it from any linked menu items.
messages.delete_group_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group? Items in this group will be moved to 'Default'.

attendance_live.heading: Who's Working Now
attendance_live.subtitle: Real-time status of clocked-in employees.

attendance_reports.subtitle: OT + pay breakdown — validated records only.
attendance_reports.select_date_range_prompt: Select a date range to load the labor summary.
attendance_reports.pending_validation_notice: Some records are still pending validation and are not included in this summary.

attendance_absences.log_as_worked_title: Log as worked — converts this into a validated shift

validation.title: Validate Attendance
validation.description: Review and adjust times before locking this record.
validation.correction_description: This record was already validated. Corrections will recompute pay.

validation.break_order_error: Each break's end must be after its start.
validation.confirm_description_prefix: This will lock the attendance record and recompute pay.
validation.confirm_description_strong: A manager can still correct it later if needed.

request_time_off.description: Submit a request for time off. Your manager will review it.
request_time_off.document_url_hint: Link to medical certificates or other supporting documents.

shift_template.color_hint: Select a color to identify this template

request_shift_swap.title: Request Shift Swap
request_shift_swap.description: Propose a shift swap with another staff member.

log_shift_worked.fallback_error: Failed to log shift as worked
log_shift_worked.title: Log Shift as Worked
log_shift_worked.description: Resolve this no-show by entering the employee's real check-in and check-out times.
log_shift_worked.success_description: The attendance record has been created and validated.
log_shift_worked.no_show_notice: This shift was flagged as a no-show. Logging it as worked clears the unauthorized absence.
log_shift_worked.notes_placeholder: e.g. confirmed by phone call, forgot to clock in

staff_availability.title: Recurring Weekly Availability
staff_availability.description: Set your preferred working hours for each day of the week.

bulk_weekly_setup.title: Bulk Staff Shift Setup
bulk_weekly_setup.description: Assign multiple shifts to a specific staff member across different dates.
bulk_weekly_setup.unpaid_break_hint: This time will be deducted from paid hours.

individual_schedule.create_description: Assign a shift to an individual employee.
individual_schedule.no_show_flagged: This shift was flagged as a no-show.
individual_schedule.post_open_shift_hint: Allows any eligible staff to bid or claim.
individual_schedule.past_shift_warning: Warning: You are scheduling a shift in the past.
individual_schedule.required_role_hint: If set, the system will verify the employee has this role.
individual_schedule.unpaid_break_hint: This time will be deducted from paid hours.

recurring_rule.description: Define a shift pattern that repeats every week.
recurring_rule.active_hint: Determines if this rule is used during draft generation.
recurring_rule.interval_hint: Bi-weekly and Monthly intervals only generate shifts on weeks that match the start date's modulo.
recurring_rule.exception_dates_hint: Skip this recurrence on specific dates (e.g. a one-off holiday) without changing the rule's start/end date.

bulk_schedule.title: Bulk Schedule Team
bulk_schedule.description: Assign shifts to all active employees in a team across multiple dates.
bulk_schedule.unpaid_break_hint: This time will be deducted from paid hours.

staff_messages_compose.heading: Send Announcements & Messages
staff_messages_compose.expires_help: Leave as "Never" to keep it visible indefinitely.

revenue_chart.title: Revenue Over Time
revenue_chart.description: Daily revenue trends for the selected period

busiest_hours_chart.title: Busiest Hours
busiest_hours_chart.description: Guests seated by hour of day for the selected period

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect FlairSync to the tools you already use — delivery platforms, payment processors, accounting software, and more, all in one place.

uber_eats.name: Uber Eats
uber_eats.description: Sync your menu and receive delivery orders directly into your POS and KDS.

glovo.name: Glovo
glovo.description: Accept Glovo orders without a second tablet — orders land straight in your kitchen queue.

just_eat.name: Just Eat
just_eat.description: Centralize Just Eat orders alongside your dine-in and takeaway tickets.

deliveroo.name: Deliveroo
deliveroo.description: Bring Deliveroo orders into the same kitchen display as everything else.

stripe.name: Stripe
stripe.description: Take card payments directly at checkout instead of relying on a separate terminal.

sumup.name: SumUp
sumup.description: Process payments through the SumUp card reader you may already use at the counter.

sage.name: Sage
sage.description: Export sales, tips, and payroll straight to your books — no more manual CSV imports.

holded.name: Holded
holded.description: Keep your gestoría in sync automatically with daily revenue and invoice exports.

pennylane.name: Pennylane
pennylane.description: Send sales and expenses straight to your comptable, ready for VAT and payroll.

google_business.name: Google Business Profile
google_business.description: Keep your hours, menu, and reviews in sync with Google.

thefork.name: TheFork
thefork.description: Sync your table availability and pull reviews from the region's top reservation platform.

mailchimp.name: Mailchimp
mailchimp.description: Turn repeat guests into a mailing list for promotions and updates.

integrations.footer_note: Have an integration you'd love to see? Let us know from the Help Center and we'll factor it into our roadmap.
